step1.title: Choose a space
step1.subtitle: Which Barcelona location would you like to transform?

step2.title: Choose your viewpoint
step2.subtitle: Select the perspective you want to change

step3.title: Describe your change
step3.subtitle: What would you like to see here?
step3.placeholder: e.g. Replace car lanes with a green promenade and outdoor café terraces…
step3.errorEmpty: Please describe the change you'd like to see
step3.errorBlocked: This content isn't suitable for this platform. Please try a different idea.

step4.title: Review your proposal
step4.subtitle: Check your idea and optionally share who you are
step4.consentLabel: I agree my proposal may be displayed publicly on this platform
step4.privacyNote: Only your name, age, and proposal text are stored. No other personal data is collected.

step5.title: Creating your vision…
step5.carouselTitle: While you wait — see what others imagined here
step5.carouselFallbackTitle: Explore this space while you wait
